# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: "/dev/null"
  access_log_format: "%r %s"
  bind_address: "0.0.0.0"
  bind_port: 9901
  x_forwarded_prefix_header: ""
  service_cluster: envoy-admin
  service_name: envoy-admin

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: admin
      address:
        socket_address:
          protocol: TCP
          address: 127.0.0.1
          port_value: 9901
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: ratelimit
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.ratelimit.v3.RateLimit
                request_limit_stats_name: envoy.request.limits
                sampler:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/google.api.Metrics.SamplerConfiguration
                  rate: 0.05
            - name: static_resources.stat
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.static_resources.v3.StaticResources
            - name: envoy.stats
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.stats.v3.Stats
                stats_prefix: "envoy"
                service_name: envoy
            - name: envoy.health_check
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.health_check.v3.HealthCheck
                health_check_service:
                  name: envoy.service.health.check
  clusters:
    - name: admin-cluster
      connect_timeout: 5s
      type: strict_dns
      lb_policy:
        tollerance: 0ms
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: admin-cluster
        endpoints:
          - lb_subset:
              endpoint:
                address:
                  socket_address:
                    protocol: TCP
                    address: "127.0.0.1"
                    port_value: 9901

service:
  cluster: admin-cluster
